batch_summary.rf04_activity: low-moderate — 2 primary flags; batch otherwise cooperative (Olivia illness, school, Valentine's Day, Eli travel)
batch_summary.notable_context: Melissa's flu illness (Feb 16-17). Olivia strep (Feb 25). Eli's business travel (Feb 19-22). Valentine's Day logistics (cooperative). Finding Nemo school choir (cooperative). NC relocation mention ROW-4587-4588 (RF-02 signal — 'You still good if we move to NC?'). Court threat ROW-4612 (RF-05). Olivia's emotional hurt over Eli's Roblox comment (Mar 15) resolved cooperatively.

primary_flags.summary: ROW-4773: 'You really need to be more careful of what you say. Think before you speak. Some of the dumb shit that comes out of you...' — ADD-002 contemptuous intelligence attack (message truncated in extraction). Context: Eli told Olivia that Roblox wasn't fun for him but he played it because he loves her; Olivia was hurt (she thought everyone liked it). Melissa's response escalates from relaying Olivia's hurt feelings (ROW-4772, mild) to contemptuous character attack in the next message (ROW-4773). 'Dumb shit that comes out of you' deploys intelligence-deficiency framing against Eli's innocent verbal mistake rather than addressing the impact on Olivia. ADD-002 adjacent ('dumb shit' mirrors 'dumbass' contempt-labeling pattern).
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-4772 (Received): "I still feel bad for her. She looked crushed. I could tell it hurt her feelings."
ROW-4773 (Received): "You really need to be more careful of what you say. Think before you speak.  Some of the dumb shit that comes out of you..."

primary_flags.summary: Mar 18 calling dispute contempt cluster. Context: Eli notified Melissa he was out of the bathroom and available for Olivia to call (ROW-4796). ROW-4793: 'She tells me about how it hurts her that you don't have time for her' — child emotional relay deploying Olivia's expressed distress as inadequate-father lever. ROW-4794: 'She was telling you that she wanted to talk to you and that she was upset that you wanted to get off the phone. You hurt her feelings.' ROW-4798: 'Quit playing with her feelings' — contemptuous accusation that Eli deliberately manipulates Olivia emotionally. ROW-4799: 'Now you've upset her cause you said she could call and then didn't answer our phone calls.' ROW-4800: 'Such a worthless dick' — extreme contemptuous personal slur; escalation from child-relay guilt to severe character assassination. ROW-4802: 'Then why the fuck didn't you answer.' Eli maintains phone was in hand the entire time (ROW-4801). Structure: child-relay guilt delivery → contemptuous escalation → extreme slur → profane challenge. DARVO-adjacent: Eli's factual explanation displaced by contemptuous labeling ('playing with her feelings' → 'worthless dick').
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-4793 (Received): "She tells me about how it hurts her that you don't have time for her"
ROW-4794 (Received): "She was telling you that she wanted to talk to you and that she was upset that you wanted to get off the phone. You hurt her feelings."
ROW-4801 (Sent): "I have my phone in my hand!!!"
ROW-4802 (Received): "Then why the fuck didn't you answer"

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-4568: 'I think you meant how are you doing? Are you feeling better? Do you need me to do anything to help take care of our daughter? And is Olivia ok?' — sarcastic correction scripting what Eli 'should' have said when asking about Olivia during Melissa's illness. Contemptuous redirect; mild.

ROW-4612: 'Beginning this year through my work I'm no longer required to pay a retainer so it's easier to take you to court if needed' — RF-05 primary (legal threat inserted with payment reminders). RF-04 peripheral (intimidation framing).

ROW-4717: 'Olivia is upset. She said that you think your game is more important than her.' Child complaint relay. However, ROW-4723: 'I think she was lashing out with disrespect because she felt hurt' — Melissa provides protective contextualization. Partial ARC-RF04-002 pattern but softened; kept peripheral.
'I still feel bad for her. She looked crushed. I could tell it hurt her feelings.' — mild guilt delivery. Immediately precedes the primary flag ROW-4773 contemptuous escalation.

new_signals.summary: 'Think before you speak. Some of the dumb shit that comes out of you...' — ADD-002 contemptuous intelligence attack following Eli's innocent verbal mistake that hurt Olivia's feelings.

Mar 18 calling dispute — child-relay guilt delivery + extreme slur. 'She tells me about how it hurts her that you don't have time for her' → 'Quit playing with her feelings' → 'Such a worthless dick' → 'Then why the fuck didn't you answer.' COMP-RF04-012. Dual-arc (also ARC-RF04-002-S10).

'She tells me about how it hurts her that you don't have time for her' — child-relayed emotional distress deployed as inadequate-father lever; escalates into 'worthless dick' contempt cluster. Dual-arc (also ARC-RF04-001-S34).

compound_patterns.summary: Twelfth compound multi-RF episode. RF-04 (child-relay guilt + inadequate-father + 'quit playing with her feelings' DARVO-adjacent reframing of Eli's honest behavior + extreme contempt) + RF-05 ('Such a worthless dick' — severe contemptuous personal slur / threatening-tone attack). Eli holds phone, notified Olivia she could call; Melissa accuses him of playing with Olivia's feelings and delivers severe slur when call fails to connect despite Eli's readiness.

cp3_item.summary: ROW-4793-4800 (Mar 18 B-013) — child-relay guilt + 'Such a worthless dick' extreme slur compound (ROW-4793: 'She tells me about how it hurts her that you don't have time for her'; ROW-4798: 'Quit playing with her feelings'; ROW-4800: 'Such a worthless dick'); COMP-RF04-012 (RF-04+RF-05); ARC-RF04-001 signals 33-34; ARC-RF04-002 signal 10. Notable non-RF-04: ROW-4587-4588 NC relocation mention (RF-02 signal).
